text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There's a meet and greet happening<n>at the
academy today. A group of kids<n>are waiting
onstage, bubbling with<n>excitement.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And now, on to the next activity, "Fun<n>'n'
Games with the Racers!"

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa... I wonder if I can handle all<n>of them...
But—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, who wants to play tag?! First<n>one here
gets to be it!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urara gets along with the kids so<n>naturally... I-I
have to try to do the<n>same!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, everyone! Do you<n>wanna—want to play
with B-Big Sis<n>Doto?

text_block_list.name: Precocious Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? What, you wanna play with<n>us?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Y-yes!

text_block_list.name: Precocious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess it wouldn't hurt.<n>Whatcha think,
Boss?

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
So be it. Just know that the Brat<n>Brigade isn't
soft on any newbies!<n>You'll have your work cut
out for you,<n>understand?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Thank you, thank you very<n>much!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though she struggles in the<n>beginning, Meisho
Doto tries her best<n>as the newest member of the
group.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... I can't keep up!They're so full of energy!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Hey, keep your head in the game!<n>It's against
the rules to let your guard<n>down in cops and
robbers!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, Boss... all the robbers besides<n>us have
already been caught.

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Fool! That's why we're gonna break<n>our
comrades outta jail and make a<n>huge comeback!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Boy
text_block_list.text: Guys, I found their boss! Let's get<n>her!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, they're gonna catch her and<n>put her in
jail! She... She needs me!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text: Wha?! What're you doing, newbie?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll hold them back! Boss, you go<n>save
everyone in jail!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! ...Newbie, I'll never forget the<n>sacrifice you
made!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The meet and greet event continues<n>with
occasional instances of dramatic<n>suspense.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our day of fun and<n>games has
come to an end! Everyone,<n>take care on the way
home!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ph-phew... I'm exhausted. I don't<n>think the kids
really liked me in the<n>end... They just ordered me
around<n>every which way.

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna say goodbye! Come<n>with us,
Doto!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's keep playing together!<n>Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-oh my gosh! There there, everyone!<n>Don't cry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, it's okay! But wow!<n>Sounds like you
all had a blast playing<n>with Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...D-do you really think so?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Of course! They wouldn't be bawling<n>their eyes
out if they didn't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-really?! I thought I was doing a badjob, but actually... sniffle... Now Imight start crying tooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, hey, e-everyone, it'll be all right!<n>The event's
done for the day, but I'll<n>always be here at the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So let's... play together again<n>whenever you all
want!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto gently comforts the kids<n>before
they reluctantly part ways.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, hey, e-everyone, it'll be all right!<n>The event's
done for the day, but I'll<n>always be—

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Get her, comrades! We're taking<n>Doto back with
us!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Where are you taking<n>meeee?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Helpless against the combined might<n>of the
impassioned kids, Meisho Doto<n>is dragged
away.
